title: ICM agent.yaml manifest
description: The per-workflow declarative manifest (ADR-0088). Maps 1:1 to the CMA agent object: `system` is COMPOSED by the backend loader from `system_compose`; the remaining keys are the structured fields where least-privilege is enforced. Structure only — the `tools`/`okf_rooms` subset invariant (workflow ⊆ domain ⊆ Constitution) is cross-file and is checked by scripts/agent-yaml-gate.mjs, not by this schema. See docs/agents/agent-yaml-schema.md and CONSTITUTION.md §3.

name.description: Workspace name; unique within the domain. Kebab-case business name (CONVENTIONS Naming).

model.description: A settled-stack Claude model id (ADR-0043). Not provider-agnostic.

system_compose.description: Ordered list of prose files the loader concatenates into the cached `system` prefix. MUST begin with the Constitution, then the domain room.md, then end at the workflow prose. Stable -> caches; never interpolate per-run volatile data here.

allOf.description: Last entry is the workflow prose (./prose.md).

tools.description: Least-privilege tool allow-list. MUST be a subset of the domain's tools (invariant enforced by the gate). Allow-list, not implicit.

okf_rooms.description: The data scope: OKF rooms (ADR-0086) this worker may read. MUST be a subset of the domain's rooms; every entry resolves to a coverage-matrix row whose `domain` matches this workflow's domain (or `kernel`).

skills.description: Runtime skills by path, cross/domain/workflow tiers only (CONVENTIONS skills). Cite as icm/skills/<slug>, domains/<d>/skills/<slug>, or ./skills/<slug>.

autonomy_rung.description: L0-L3: what `auto` mode may self-approve. Every workflow still starts `draft`; the flip to auto is admin-only, read from autopilot_policies (ADR-0061/0087).

archetype.description: Optional workflow-archetype tag (ADR-0136 §B). 'advisory' = a read-only consultation desk (archetype B10): the workflow FIELDS a delegated domain question and returns a persona-shaped, fully-cited answer to the delegating agent — no actuation, no side effect, no send. The gate (scripts/agent-yaml-gate.mjs) enforces the structural contract: an advisory workflow MUST be autonomy_rung L0 and its tools MUST be a subset of {pg.read, knowledge.search, memory.recall}. Absent = an ordinary (procedure) workflow.

auto_may_self_approve.description: Prose statement of what `auto` may self-approve at this rung. Anything unstated parks for a human.

mcp_servers.description: Optional MCP servers. Credentials via vaults, NEVER inline (ADR-0060). No secret values in this file.

vault_secret_ref.description: Key Vault reference (name/id) for the server's OAuth credential. A reference, never a value.
